KOMEIJIKOISHI-ULTIMATE_UNCONSCIOUS_FORM_: Whenever you play a card yourself, automatically play [gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards from hand equal to the stack count. Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM_STANCE_POWER.title: Bloom
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM_STANCE_POWER.smartDe: When you play an Attack, deal damage equal to that card's base damage to a random enemy. [gold]Block[/gold] gained is reduced by {BlockReduction}%. Upon entering this stance, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM_STANCE_POWER.descrip: When you play an Attack, deal damage equal to that card's damage to a random enemy. [gold]Block[/gold] gained is reduced by 70%. Upon entering, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED_STANCE_POWER.title: Closed
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED_STANCE_POWER.smartD: [gold]Block[/gold] gained is increased by {BlockBonus}%. Draw 1 card upon entering this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED_STANCE_POWER.descri: [gold]Block[/gold] gained is increased by 20%. Draw 1 card upon entering this stance.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-RECOGNIZED_GENIUS_POWER.sm: All [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards generated during combat are automatically upgraded.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUPEREGO_POWER.smartDescri: Upon entering [gold]Closed[/gold] stance, draw {Amount} extra cards. Upon entering [gold]Bloom[/gold] stance, gain {Amount:energyIcons()} extra energy.
